text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this year's Takarazuka Kinen, a multitude of
hopes and desires will meet to face off on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One racer wants to find her own way of running,
another wants to stand as a preventative wall,
while the third wants to overleap that wall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright steps out onto the turf at Hanshin,
determined to face the new generation of racing.
